The model architecture is working correctly without channel mismatch errors. Now I want to try to further improve the performance by increasing the model capacity slightly and training for more epochs.

Analysis: The current model uses hidden_channels=64, which results in a maximum of 256 channels in the deeper layers. I can try increasing this to 80 or 96 to provide more capacity for learning complex patterns in the weather data. Additionally, I can train for more epochs since the model showed continued improvement during the 5 epochs of training.

Decision: I'll modify the model to use hidden_channels=80 (which will result in up to 320 channels in deeper layers) and train for 10 epochs instead of 5. This should provide more capacity for the model to learn complex spatiotemporal patterns while still being within computational constraints.
